context: Tests whether the agent posts a Metric to the Illuminate Admin API with required headers, references the Business Object correctly, configures a COUNT aggregation with a user-ID dimension, and picks a documented evaluation window value.

checklist.name: businessObjectId in body
checklist.description: Request body includes businessObjectId set to the function's argument

checklist.name: COUNT aggregation
checklist.description: Request body defines a COUNT (or COUNT_DISTINCT) aggregation function

checklist.name: Dimension on userIdFieldId
checklist.description: Request body defines a dimension/grouping referencing the userIdFieldId argument

checklist.name: evaluationWindow is 60
checklist.description: Request body sets the evaluation window to 60 seconds (or one of the documented allowed values: 60, 300, 600, 900, 1800, 3600, 86400)

checklist.name: Allowed-window comment
checklist.description: Top-of-file comment lists the allowed evaluation window values (60, 300, 600, 900, 1800, 3600, 86400)
